reasoning: Both sets cover the same core facts (Digital Omnibus agreement, Annex III postponed to 2 Dec 2027, Annex I postponed to 2 Aug 2028, political agreement reached 6-7 May 2026), matching the anchor. However, Content A includes a source (compliancehub.wiki) that states an inconsistent Annex I deadline of August 2027, contradicting other entries within the same result set and the anchor's stated 2028 date.
